description:
Add cross-flow browser checks that catch patient-facing accessibility, responsive, and visual regressions before launch.

**Scope**
- Add Playwright accessibility checks for critical pages and flow states, using `@axe-core/playwright` or an equivalent maintained tool if selected.
- Capture responsive coverage for mobile, tablet, and desktop viewport groups on marketing, auth, intake, dashboard, and billing paths.
- Add focused visual snapshots only for stable surfaces where they provide useful regression signal without excessive churn.
- Include checks for no obvious text overlap/clipping, visible focus order, sufficient landmark structure, and design-system constraints such as no clinical blue.

**Acceptance**
- Critical launch flows have automated accessibility checks with documented exceptions, if any.
- Responsive specs prove major patient journeys remain usable on mobile and desktop.
- Visual snapshots are scoped, deterministic, and documented so legitimate design changes are easy to review.
- The checks integrate into the E2E command set without making basic smoke runs unreasonably slow.
title: Accessibility, responsive, and visual regression Playwright checks
